aboutTeaser.title: Hello, I'm Dr. Pouyan Yary.
aboutTeaser.intro: I am Dr. med. Pouyan Yary, Specialist in Plastic, Reconstructive and Aesthetic Surgery. My practice Capital Aesthetics is located on Berlin's Kurfürstendamm.
aboutTeaser.vita: I completed my medical degree at the University of Heidelberg. Clinical stations took me to UCLA in California and to Brazil, then on to the burn centers Köln-Merheim and Unfallkrankenhaus Berlin. At Park-Klinik Birkenwerder I specialized in lipedema surgery and autologous fat transfer. Today, with over ten years of surgical experience, I treat patients from Germany and abroad.
aboutTeaser.imageAlt: Dr. Pouyan Yary in white coat, professional portrait
aboutTeaser.quoteStart: My greatest professional reward isn't the most beautiful procedure, it's the
aboutTeaser.quoteEnd: a patient takes home with her.

faq.title: Answers to your most important questions.
faq.intro: A selection of questions we regularly receive. For everything else: arrange a personal consultation.

items.q: When is plastic surgery suitable for me?
items.a: Plastic and aesthetic procedures make sense when a specific wish for change meets realistic expectations. In a personal consultation we clarify indication, possible procedures and alternatives, open-ended and without pressure.

items.q: How does the initial consultation work?
items.a: The initial consultation lasts 45 to 60 minutes. We discuss your wish, individual anatomy and life situation. A clinical examination follows, then a concrete treatment proposal with a cost estimate.

items.q: What are the risks of an aesthetic procedure?
items.a: Every surgical procedure carries risks such as bleeding, wound healing problems or scarring. Dr. Yary explains all procedure-specific risks and rarer complications in writing during the consultation.

items.q: How long is the recovery time?
items.a: Recovery time varies by procedure. For Botox you are immediately socially presentable, larger operations take 2 to 3 weeks. You receive a precise prognosis after the clinical examination.
Surgical procedures like lifting, breast lift or BBL deliver long-term results (often 10+ years). Minimally invasive treatments like Botox or filler are reversible and require regular refreshment.
Costs vary by procedure and individual findings. A first orientation can be found on the respective treatment page. A binding cost estimate is provided after the personal consultation.

items.name: Sarah K.
items.body: I had a breast augmentation with Dr. Yary and can only speak positively. From the first consultation to the aftercare I felt completely looked after. The result is absolutely natural, exactly what I had hoped for.

items.name: Lena M.
items.body: Dr. Yary really takes his time, listens, and never pushes you. He told me openly what made sense and what he advised against. That builds trust. The procedure itself and the aftercare were exemplary.

items.name: Julia B.
items.body: Had a lip filler and I'm thrilled. A very sensitive, honest doctor who never overdoes it. The result looks natural and harmonious. The practice on Ku'damm is beautiful too.

items.name: Anna L.
items.body: I travelled all the way from Munich and it was completely worth it. The VASER liposuction on my legs was a turning point. Dr. Yary is an artist: precise, professional, and deeply human at the same time.

items.name: Sophie R.
items.body: Best experience with a doctor in a long time. I was scared at first but Dr. Yary walked me through every step. Six months after surgery: outstanding result, no complications. Absolute recommendation.

items.name: Carla T.
items.body: Botox and filler treatment with Dr. Yary. Nobody can tell I had anything done, but I feel fresher. Exactly what I wanted. Highly recommended.

items.name: Nina P.
items.body: Highly competent doctor with a lot of experience. The lipedema treatment was absolutely professional, the whole team in the practice is friendly and very attentive. My life changed afterwards. Finally I can live without pain again.

items.name: Marie H.
items.body: I researched for a long time before deciding on a breast surgery. Dr. Yary was the right choice from the start. Clear explanation, no sales pressure, and the result is exactly what we discussed. Thank you so much!

treatmentTemplate.closingBody: Every treatment begins with a personal conversation. We take time for your anatomy, your life situation and your expectations, before we recommend any procedure.

treatmentsHub.title: Surgical Procedures.
treatmentsHub.intro: Plastic and reconstructive surgery across six focus areas: breast, face, abdomen, legs, arms and buttocks. Every area follows the same principle: respect anatomy, age naturally.

minimalHub.title: Minimally Invasive Procedures.
minimalHub.intro: Procedures without a scalpel, botulinum toxin, hyaluronic acid fillers, biostimulants, laser, PRP and radiofrequency microneedling. Subtle, effective, with minimal downtime.

about.title: Dr. med. Pouyan Yary.
about.tagline: Specialist in Plastic, Reconstructive and Aesthetic Surgery.
about.lede: Over 10 years of operative experience. Medical degree in Heidelberg, stations at UCLA and in Brazil, advanced training at the largest German burn centres.
about.introBody: My academic journey began at the oldest and most renowned university in Heidelberg, where I successfully completed my medical studies. During my training I had the privilege of completing parts of my education at the University of California, Los Angeles (UCLA) as well as in Brazil. These international experiences significantly broadened my horizons and provided valuable insights into diverse approaches in plastic and aesthetic surgery.
about.introBody2: After my studies I continued my training at renowned clinics for Plastic, Reconstructive and Aesthetic Surgery. Among others I worked at the largest German burn centres, the Klinikum Köln-Merheim and the Unfallkrankenhaus Berlin. There I dedicated myself in particular to skin reconstruction, restoration of limb function and the treatment of scars.
about.introBody3: I then developed my skills further at Park-Klinik Birkenwerder and specialised in Aesthetic Surgery. Today, with more than 10 years of operative experience, I offer a wide range of procedures.
about.specBody: Currently I focus on face and body contouring and tightening. I use both minimally invasive and surgical methods to tailor treatments individually to your needs. My goal is natural and harmonious results that underline your personal beauty.
about.philoBody: Beauty is very personal and touches us all, but is subject only to a small extent to universal principles. I therefore prefer the term aesthetics, the science of sensory perception, because it emphasises individual feeling. My priority is to explore with my patients the motivation behind their wish. The first conversation is conducted pressure-free and open-ended.

vita.label: Training, University of California, Los Angeles

memberships: DGPRÄC, German Society of Plastic, Reconstructive and Aesthetic Surgeons
DGBT, Certified trainer of the German Society for Aesthetic Botulinum Therapy (since November 2022)
Galderma, Trainer, lecturer and Key Opinion Leader (KOL) at Galderma Laboratorium GmbH (since July 2022)
about.quote: Beauty is personal. My work begins with a conversation that listens.
about.ctaBody: Arrange a consultation at Capital Aesthetics on Kurfürstendamm. We take the time you need. Open-ended, without pressure.

academy.title: Your path to mastery in aesthetic medicine.
academy.tagline: "A doctor is a student until they die."
academy.intro: The Yary Aesthetic Academy is a training centre for physicians who wish to deepen their skills in minimally invasive aesthetic procedures. Training combines the latest scientific advances with practical clinical experience.
academy.programsBody: My academy was created to offer physicians a comprehensive education that enables them to move confidently in the world of modern aesthetic techniques. Through carefully planned workshops, intensive hands-on courses and regular in-house training, I offer programmes focused on practical application of the acquired knowledge.
curriculum: Detailed knowledge of products and their properties
academy.safetyHeading: Safety and quality as a priority
academy.safetyBody: Patient safety and the highest quality of procedures form the foundation of every training. As a certified trainer of the German Society for Aesthetic Botulinum Therapy (DGBT) since November 2022 I have the competencies to convey knowledge in accordance with the highest European standards. Since July 2022 I have also been active as trainer, lecturer and Key Opinion Leader (KOL) at Galderma Laboratorium GmbH.
academy.communityBody: Our training covers not only medical techniques but also essential areas such as patient communication, digital marketing and building a successful aesthetic practice in the modern medical landscape.
academy.ctaBody: Experience from international conferences and specialised workshops for physicians from across Europe flows directly into my trainings.
